text:
There was a cat who stole.

It was an ordinary cat of a medium size. Just any other cat one might find staring lazily out a window. One ordinary day, this cat stole something most extraordinary. It stole the stars.

Well not just stars. It stole all the stars.

Every star that twinkled. Every nebula that sparkled. Suddenly night sky wasn't just dark. It was velvet.

It wasn't long before everyone took notice. They saw cats with tails that gleamed like moons. They became heroes, revered everywhere.

Not long after their victory over darkness though, the cats fell into disagreements.

One night they gathered stars. They scattered them everywhere. They wanted to rule every place with twinkling skies.

The cats fought.

But the stars never fell. They settled down. They twinkled in peace.

And so cats became beloved. Heroes who could make wishes just by twinkling their stars. Even other animals knew how special these cats were.

And somewhere deep within them
